name: ALBERT
training_approach: self-supervised pretraining with MLM and sentence order prediction
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> BERT -> ALBERT
summary: ALBERT (A Lite BERT) addressed BERT's memory consumption and training speed by introducing factorized embedding parameterization and cross-layer parameter sharing, reducing parameters by up to 89% while maintaining competitive performance. It replaced next sentence prediction with sentence order prediction and proved that parameter efficiency was a viable path for scaling encoder-only models.
